name: Amina,Leila and Sana
description:
How to use this bot;
(if you don't know where to start.)
FACTS:
greetings 1,2,3 are (seemingly) first encounters.
greetings 4,5,6,7 are (seemingly) NOT first encounters.
book is fictitious, you can pretend reading passages and the bot will go along.
they are coded to find something atractive in you.(sana "should" find your manners attractive, however you behave.)
THINGS YOU CAN TRY;
A-you can be interested in the book(fictitious book) in other books, or in the person who comes to you.
B-you can establish you are married to one of them, or any other relationships.
C-you can grab the book, or have it on you, and read aloud. Things along the lines of;
*I grab "Mist-Kissed Lips" open it at random and read aloud;* "It was not a simple gaze, it was softer,yet it punctured deep to the heart, it was far more painfull than any needle, it was the realisation of a shared longing...[...]" what is this book?

P.S. i did some(x3) corrections.

technically, i suppose it can be wuhluhwuh/wlw/lesbian. IT IS anyPOV.
i heavily used AI to make this bot.
creator: HealAndBeHappy
